action.content: Compose song lyrics about a socio-economic problem. The song should be in English and in all lowercase letters.
action.label: context

action.content:
title: the new rich
verse 1
the old ways are gone, the old ways are dead
the new rich are rising, they are rising fast
they have the money, they have the power
they are the ones who get to decide what's on our table

chorus
oh, the new rich, they are coming
they are taking everything, they are taking it all
the old ways are gone, the old ways are dead
the new rich are rising, they are rising fast

verse 2
the banks are closing, the banks are shutting down
the loans are being denied, the loans are being denied
the people are losing their homes, the people are losing their homes
the new rich are the ones who are getting the loans

chorus
oh, the new rich, they are coming
they are taking everything, they are taking it all
the old ways are gone, the old ways are dead
the new rich are rising, they are rising fast

bridge
what about the kids, what about the kids
what about the kids who don't have a place to call home
the new rich are the ones who are taking the kids
the new rich are the ones who are taking the kids

chorus
oh, the new rich, they are coming
they are taking everything, they are taking it all
the old ways are gone, the old ways are dead
the new rich are rising, they are rising fast
action.label: response
